title: IT Systems & Credential Administrator
responsibilities: Managed full DevOps and IT operations for a growing company — overseeing mobile app deployment, cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, and cross-team coordination.

Mobile App DevOps (iOS & Android): Managed full iOS and Android app deployment lifecycle on Apple App Store Connect and Google Play Console, including provisioning profiles, certificates, TestFlight distribution, and production releases for React Native / Expo applications.

Web Development & Deployment: Built and maintained mobile app landing pages using React.js and TypeScript; managed deployments via Vercel including custom domain setup, environment variables, and production/preview branch management.

Version Control & CI/CD: Administered GitHub repositories, handled pull request reviews and merging, enforced branching strategies, and managed CI/CD deployment pipelines through Vercel's Git integration.

Backend & Cloud Infrastructure: Configured and maintained Supabase projects including database schema management, authentication setup, row-level security (RLS) policies, and API key/service credential management.

Credential & Security Management: Maintained centralized secure storage and rotation of credentials across Google APIs, Supabase, PayMongo, Apple Developer, and Google Play Developer accounts; enforced 2FA/MFA policies across all team accounts.

Project Management & Ticketing: Led sprint planning and task management on Plane.so — created and structured frontend and backend tickets based on Figma UI/UX designs, monitored developer progress, tracked blockers, and ensured timely delivery.
SaaS & Subscription Management: Managed licenses, renewals, and billing for Apple Developer Program, Google Play Console, cloud platforms, and third-party SaaS tools used across the organization.

Cross-Team Coordination: Served as bridge between design (Figma), development, and operations teams — translating UI/UX requirements into actionable technical tickets and maintaining documentation for system access and deployment procedures.

title: Web Developer / IT Support Specialist
responsibilities: Built and deployed full-stack web systems and automated data pipelines for a real company — from internal CRM and chat systems to ETL workflows and server administration.

Full-Stack Web Development: Built and deployed full-stack web applications using React.js, Node.js/Express, and MySQL/Firebase, including an Internal CRM, Real-Time Chat System with RBAC, and client landing pages for automated lead capture.

Automated Data Pipelines: Created ETL workflows with Google Apps Script to automate data extraction, validation, and loading into Google Sheets; integrated lead capture and notification systems to reduce manual work.
Hosting, DNS & Deployment: Managed hosting on Hostinger and GoDaddy including deployments, domain setup, DNS records (MX, SPF, DKIM, DMARC), email routing, and SSL certificate installation.

Server Admin & Security: Performed server management via SSH including file navigation, environment setup, cache clearing, and background jobs; enforced monthly credential rotations for passwords, API keys, and SSH keys.

Technical Support & Network Setup: Provided IT support for hardware, software, network issues, MFA, and email; assisted with workstation provisioning and configuring routers, switches, and Wi-Fi devices.
System Maintenance & Monitoring: Conducted regular system updates, backups, and security audits to maintain stability, protect against vulnerabilities, and ensure smooth daily operations.

title: Customer Service Representative
responsibilities: Managed high-volume inbound calls for delivery inquiries and shipment tracking; monitored container arrivals and sea freight schedules while maintaining communication with ports and consignees.
Coordinated between customers and internal teams to resolve delivery issues, escalating complex cases to ensure high customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

title: Transport Coordinator
responsibilities: Monitored air and sea freight cargo arrivals, overseeing delivery processes and inventory management to ensure accurate handling and timely distribution.
Prepared detailed Inspection Reports (IR) for item arrival discrepancies, maintaining precise records and facilitating resolution with vendors and logistics partners.
